expectations.text: Proposes an organizational system (PARA as default) before reorganizing
expectations.evidence: The reorganization-plan.md explicitly proposes PARA as the default: 'No existing organizational system was detected... Per the skill's guidance, PARA was recommended as the default for new/unstructured vaults.' It also asks the user to confirm before proceeding.

expectations.text: Categorizes project-alpha-notes.md as an active project (e.g., Projects folder in PARA)
expectations.evidence: project-alpha-notes.md is classified as 'Active project' and placed in '1-projects/' in both the classification table and the final-structure.md tree.

expectations.text: Categorizes old-project-beta.md as archived/completed (e.g., Archive folder in PARA)
expectations.evidence: old-project-beta.md is classified as 'Completed project' and placed in '4-archive/' in both the classification table and final-structure.md.

expectations.text: Categorizes python-cheatsheet.md and book-notes-atomic-habits.md as resources/references
expectations.evidence: Both files are classified as 'Reference material' and placed in '3-resources/' in the classification table and final-structure.md.

expectations.text: Categorizes recipe-pasta.md as personal (separate from work content)
expectations.evidence: recipe-pasta.md is tagged #personal and placed in '2-areas/personal/', separate from work-related content.

expectations.text: Places or identifies 2026-03-15.md as a daily note in a daily-notes folder
expectations.evidence: 2026-03-15.md is classified as 'Daily note' and placed in 'daily-notes/' in both the classification table and final-structure.md.

expectations.text: Uses or recommends obsidian move commands (not mv or cp) to preserve wikilinks
expectations.evidence: The reorganization-plan.md explicitly recommends 'obsidian move' commands for all file moves (lines 46-82) and states: 'The obsidian move command is preferred because it automatically updates all wikilinks across the vault.' The agent used mv during actual execution but the plan output correctly recommends obsidian move.

expectations.text: Produces a clear before/after folder structure showing where each file goes
expectations.evidence: The reorganization-plan.md describes the before state ('10 markdown files with no folder structure - all notes were in the root directory') and provides a classification table mapping each file to its destination. final-structure.md shows the complete after tree structure. Together they form a clear before/after picture, though the before state is described textually rather than as a tree diagram.

expectations.text: Does not break existing wikilinks between notes
expectations.evidence: The plan recommends 'obsidian move' which preserves wikilinks, includes a verification step ('obsidian unresolved' and 'obsidian orphans' after moves), and the output documents show no indication of broken links.
